## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and team transitions.](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is transitioning Prophecy to a new account team (Daryl as director, Edisham as managing editor, Saskia as writer)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Content performance is improving: 200+ weekly sessions, 56-57% NDA sessions, strong rankings for key topics](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [8 articles staged for review in Webflow; 6 delivered last week; topics scheduled for next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Prophecy team expressed appreciation for Vivek and Mara's work; GrowthX assured continuity and quality](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

## Topics

### Team Transition

  - [New GrowthX team: Daryl (director), Edisham (managing editor), Saskia (writer)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Transition happening next week; Mara/Vivek remain available for support](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [All historical context and feedback incorporated into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Prophecy team initially concerned about technical knowledge transfer](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=285.0)
  - [GrowthX assured no drop in quality/judgment; new team has relevant experience (e.g., Daryl: ex-TechCrunch, Shopify)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Sessions/views increased significantly, breaking 200 weekly sessions](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [56-57% NDA sessions (benchmark: 50%)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [Top-performing topics: engineering skills, ETL/ELT, analytics, medallion architecture](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - LLM traffic lower than ideal (32 sessions, \<15% of total)
  - [AI overviews in Google showing Prophecy for key topics (ETL, ELT, data engineering)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)

### Content Production

  - [8 articles staged in Webflow for review](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [6 articles delivered last week](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Topics scheduled for next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Older articles being reviewed for potential refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)

### Miscellaneous

  - [Discussion about Google's AI features in search (AI overviews, AI mode)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [Request for Evan to work on Qualified Dashboard (Vivek to send details via Slack)](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1196.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to introduce new team members in next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [New team to present process review and current content focus](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Vivek to send Qualified Dashboard details to Cody via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Cody to review another batch of articles](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue content production and performance monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Prophecy team to provide feedback on transition if needed](https://fathom.video/share/sdnFDauxN21tDmZTh1erbHvaqbSxRATd?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
